book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the centre and should be in the moderate price range
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 3 people at 16:00 on monday
If the booking fails how about 15:00
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the same price range as the restaurant and should be in the type of hotel
The hotel should be in the same area as the restaurant
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 5 nights starting from the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
